title: Pro Evolution Soccer 2010
description:
"Get even closer to the action on the football field with PES 2010 - Pro
Evolution Soccer for Wii. The latest version of the hit soccer
simulation crams in new features to make the 2010 season more realistic
than ever, tweaking the groundbreaking control scheme to let you dictate
the flow of play with increased precision.

Once again boasting an officially licensed UEFA Champions League mode,
PES 2010 places you in the boots of the brightest soccer stars on the
globe as you assume control of your favorite club and national sides in
league and cup competitions. Stake your claim for a place in the
Champions League by toppling the opposition in the Master League, or
head online to play opponents around the planet вЂ“ using the team youвЂ™ve
built in Master League, Champions Road or My Team modes for the first
time to make victory taste even sweeter.

PES on Wii has always been a unique experience. Send players on decoy
runs, thread cutting passes through the defense or mark loitering
strikers using the motion-sensing power of the Wii Remote and Nunchuk.
By tracing lines on the pitch, pointing at players or making
context-sensitive movements with the controllers, you can orchestrate
the flow of the game with unmatched satisfaction. This time, an enhanced
Free Run system means players wonвЂ™t vacate their patch of grass when
another team-mate makes a Free Run into that area вЂ“ increasing your
attacking options as you move the ball up the field. Free kicks have
also changed, and are now taken from the playerвЂ™s perspective and
directed via the Wii Remote pointer. With spectacular set-pieces more
likely, your opponent might think twice about hauling you down on the
edge of the box next time! If you prefer a more traditional control
scheme, all the action on the pitch can also be controlled using the
Classic Controller.

Further enhancing the gameplay is a new stamina meter which affects
playersвЂ™ ability to constantly out-run the opposition or make countless
ball-winning challenges. Instead of simply monitoring a single stamina
meter for each player on your team, youвЂ™ll also have to keep an eye on
their вЂњinstantaneous staminaвЂќ, which is drained when players set off on
epic solo runs or constantly battle to win the ball back. If youвЂ™ve been
relying on a flying winger or battling midfielder too much, it might be
time for a change of tactics!

PES 2010 once again lets up to eight players compete together in online
play via Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection. Can you and your mates form a dream
team capable of conquering the best PES players out there? If you have
your Wii connected to the Internet, youвЂ™ll also benefit from updates to
team rosters in the summer and winter transfer windows вЂ“ ensuring your
favorite team in the real world is accurately reflected in the game.

Play your part in the ongoing evolution in football games with PES 2010
for Wii.

Special Features:

вЂў Take charge of your favorite club and national teams and compete in an
officially licensed UEFA Champions League mode.
вЂў Control all the
action with motion-based controls to put you in total control. New
additions include an overhauled free kick system.
вЂў Compete with up
to seven other players in online multiplayer and use your customized
teams for the first time on Wii.

As of May 20, 2014, the Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection service for Nintendo
DSi and Wii systems has been retired. Online features of this game are
no longer available after this date but this game still provides an
entertaining experience in offline mode.

To learn more about this service change, please visit To learn more
about this service change, please visit support.nintendo.com/servicesupdate.
